name: agent-harness
description: Reusable project harness for Codex task control, goal handoffs, and loop engineering.

interface.shortDescription: Standardize project tasks, goals, runs, and worktree decisions.
interface.longDescription: Agent Harness provides a reusable workflow contract for Codex projects: a root tasks.md backlog, a .agent-harness control directory, goal handoff rules, run preparation packets, and worktree policy guidance.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Agent Harness to inspect this project, update tasks.md, and recommend the next goal.
